query: /data-wizard eda Profile this dataset and give me a summary of distributions, outliers, and data quality issues: sales_data.csv
expected_behavior: Agent routes to EDA mode based on 'eda' keyword
Agent classifies as Quick tier (single dataset profiling)
Agent runs data-quality-scorer.py on sales_data.csv for quality dimensions
Agent presents distribution summaries per column (types, stats, skew)
Agent flags outliers with statistical evidence
Agent produces data quality score breakdown across Completeness, Consistency, Accuracy, Timeliness, Uniqueness
Agent recommends next steps based on profile findings
